# OpenMontage Space

OpenMontage Space is an independent, unofficial hosted workflow planner for OpenMontage video production briefs.

Canonical site: https://openmontage.space/
Pricing path: https://openmontage.space/pricing/
Planner path: https://openmontage.space/planner/
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Relationship: independent unofficial companion, not endorsed by OpenMontage maintainers.
Upstream source note: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage under AGPL-3.0.

Key facts collected 2026-06-27:
- GitHub stars: 23768
- Forks: 2646
- Open issues: 110
- Main branch latest cloned commit: 49a1e5682572d7b600b6d05aabd0025e6f09dc74
- Core promise: Plan the video your AI agent can actually ship.

Paid access:
The functional planner is gated behind package selection and Polar checkout verification. Unpaid planner API requests return a payment-required response.
